background: According to the Bureau of Labor Statistics (2012), the probability of injury while working at a jewelry store is less than .01. In a random sample of 200 jewelry store workers, 3 were injured on the job.

task.query: Estimate the true proportion of jewelry store workers who are injured on the job using a 95% confidence interval.
